[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / lookAt

# Method: lookAt()

```ts
lookAt(
   targetX, 
   targetY, 
   targetZ, 
   upX?, 
   upY?, 
   upZ?): void;
```

Update this layer camera's target and optional up vector.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `targetX` | `number` |
| `targetY` | `number` |
| `targetZ` | `number` |
| `upX?` | `number` |
| `upY?` | `number` |
| `upZ?` | `number` |

## Returns

`void`
